title: Cobblefake
description: An addon for Cobblemon that adds fakemons from an unknown region.
body:
**IMPORTANT: This pack has a required resource pack! Copy the pack file into the resource pack folder and it will work.**  

This is an addon for the popular Cobblemon mod that adds a bunch of new Fakemon to the game (made by yours truly). It adds new regional forms and convergent evolutions of familiar faces, but also intruduces some brand new Pokemon!

## new pokemons

![A variant of falinks is found in snowy taigas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4faea1cc513f6e4796d0f12dfe7fee9748ace387.png)

![ Lapras's paradox form is found in the cold ocean.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50955af12841368e476f96eaf3bec599c40cbb4e.png)
